items.title: Despite Barça's strong effort, Atléti end their Champions League hopes
items.dek: Barcelona looked to stage a huge comeback, but Diego Simeone's Atlético Madrid did enough to deny the Blaugrana of advancing in the Champions League.
items.body: Barcelona looked to stage a huge comeback, but Diego Simeone's Atlético Madrid did enough to deny the Blaugrana of advancing in the Champions League.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: No update on Doncic as Lakers prep for Rockets
items.dek: After putting his team through its first practice in preparation for the playoffs, Los Angeles Lakers coach JJ Redick said Tuesday he doesn't have any more info
items.body: After putting his team through its first practice in preparation for the playoffs, Los Angeles Lakers coach JJ Redick said Tuesday he doesn't have any more information about when Luka Doncic could return, only saying that the star is "out indefinitely."
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Liverpool fear for 'very-bad' looking Ekitike injury
items.dek: Hugo Ekitike has handed a major injury worry to Liverpool and France after he was forced off in the first half of his club's Champions League quarterfinal loss
items.body: Hugo Ekitike has handed a major injury worry to Liverpool and France after he was forced off in the first half of his club's Champions League quarterfinal loss to Paris Saint-Germain.
items.author: IriLine Desk
